description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored torso with a dark metallic finish and subtle green and red highlights. Its upper body is equipped with two large, rounded shoulder units, each supporting articulated arms—one arm is distinctly multi-tentacled, resembling an octopus, while the other is more mechanical and claw-like. The legs are digitigrade, ending in wide, stable feet, and the back is reinforced with rib-like structures and circular components that may serve as power or balance modules. The head is compact and integrated into the torso, with a central green-lit element suggesting a primary sensor or camera. The overall design blends organic and mechanical aesthetics, giving the robot a formidable and agile appearance suitable for urban environments. The surface is mostly matte with some glossy accents, and the construction appears to be primarily metal with synthetic overlays.
description: A dark, armored humanoid robot with a tentacled arm, mechanical claw, and digitigrade legs, featuring green and red highlights and a blend of organic and mechanical design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's tentacled left arm, mechanical right arm, compact head, and broad armored torso with green-lit central sensor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ribbed back structure, circular shoulder module, and the full extension of the tentacled arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the segmented spine-like back, symmetrical shoulder units, and the robust, armored legs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the mechanical claw arm, ribbed back, and the tentacled arm partially visible from the opposite side.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly bent, left arm extended forward in a tentacled gesture, right arm bent at the elbow with a mechanical claw, torso facing forward, and head integrated into the chest.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated armored panels and synthetic overlays with decorative colored highlights.
attribute_facial_features: No traditional facial features; head is compact and integrated into the torso with a central green-lit sensor, lacking eyes, mouth, or nose.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms have multiple articulation points including rotary and hinge joints; left arm is highly flexible with tentacle-like appendages, right arm is mechanical with a claw; legs are digitigrade with visible knee and ankle joints, allowing for agile movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Central green-lit sensor on the head/torso, possible additional sensors embedded in the tentacled arm and shoulder modules.
